revision.comment: Replace {{[[Template:CatPair|CatPair]]}} or {{[[Template:CatRel|CatRel]]}} with {{[[Template:Navseasoncats|Navseasoncats]]}} (avoid gaps > navbar size & successive name mismatches)
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Religious buildings and structures by century|11]] [[Category:Buildings and structures completed in the 11th century| religious buildings]] [[Category:11th century in religion|Buildings]] [[Category:2nd-millennium religious buildings and structures]]
